title: Bardelys the Magnificent
writer: Rafael Sabatini, Dorothy Farnum, Marian Ainslee
actors: John Gilbert, Eleanor Boardman, Roy D'Arcy
plot: In the reign of King Louis XIII, dashing rogue and libertine Marquis de Bardelys is entranced by Roxalanne de Lavedan. Against a background of knavery and intrigue he sets out to woo and win her.
